This is a new service. For urgent matters, please visit ynepf.co.uk.

Yorkshire & North East Powerlifting Federation
  • Committee
  • Calendar
  • Volunteering
  • 2026 initiatives
  • FAQs

The home of drug tested powerlifting in Yorkshire and the North East

We run a full calendar of sanctioned, drug tested competitions across the region, from your first novice meet to our divisional championships. Everyone is welcome on the platform.

Upcoming events

  • YNE Novice

    Designed for beginners and first-time lifters, this is a chance to compete without the pressure of seasoned athletes. Open to anyone who has done two competitions or fewer.

    27–28 Jun 2026 Riccall Regen Centre, York 96 lifters

  • Implexus Open

    Hosted by the Implexus Gym Powerlifting Club, the Implexus Open returns in 2026 for its third instalment.

    25–26 Jul 2026 Implexus Gym, Leeds 48 lifters

  • YNE Juniors, Masters & Bench-Only Championships

    Our divisional championship for Sub-Junior, Junior, Masters and bench-only athletes. An opportunity to compete against your peers.

    12 Sept 2026 North East Strength Culture, Darlington 64 lifters

  • Parkhead Open

    Hosted by the historic Parkhead & Wansbeck Powersports Club, the Parkhead Open returns for its second instalment in its recently upgraded facilities.

    24 Oct 2026 Hirst Welfare Centre, Ashington 48 lifters

  • YNE Worlds

    Sponsor TBD

    Our divisional championship, where one male and one female lifter can compete for the title of YNE Worlds Champion. A qualifying total is required.

    7–8 Nov 2026 Riccall Regen Centre 96 lifters

See the full 2026 competition calendar

Resources

  • Buy a membership

    To lift in the YNEPF you need a valid British Powerlifting membership.

  • Technical rules

    The rules of powerlifting performance that we follow in the YNEPF.

  • Approved kit

    Only officially registered equipment may be used in the YNEPF.

  • Divisional records

    Records set by YNEPF lifters at all levels of competition.

© Yorkshire & North East Powerlifting Federation 2026
